arabic_text:
بِسْمِ اللَّهِ الرَّحْمَنِ الرَّحِيمِ
إِنَّا أَعْطَيْنَاكَ الْكَوْثَرَ ﴿١﴾ فَصَلِّ لِرَبِّكَ وَانْحَرْ ﴿٢﴾ إِنَّ شَانِئَكَ هُوَ الْأَبْتَرُ ﴿٣﴾
english_text:
(108:1) (O Prophet), We have surely bestowed upon you good in abundance.
(108:2) So offer Prayer and sacrifice to your Lord alone.
(108:3) Verily your enemy alone has been cut off from the roots.
alt_text: Sura al-Kawthar (Q108) full text in Arabic with the basmala and three verses, followed by English translation per ayat. The shortest sura of the Quran.
notes: Complete Sura al-Kawthar (Q108) — the shortest sura.
